quotes.quote: The most valuable thing I can show you is when something fails and I have to figure out why. That debugging process — that is the actual skill.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Watching someone fail and recover teaches more than watching success.

quotes.quote: CTFs are the gym. You do not go to the gym to fight anyone. You go to get stronger so you are ready when it matters.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Often asked whether CTF skills translate to real work.

quotes.quote: Every SQL injection vulnerability exists because a developer trusted user input. That is it. Sanitise it. Parameterise it. Assume it is hostile.
quotes.why_they_said_it: He connects technique to root cause.
